hero.title: VAT Assistant UAE
hero.description: Organize UAE VAT registrations, returns, transactions, and estimate-only VAT summaries in a private workspace.

flow.title: VAT Registrations → VAT Returns → Transactions → Insights
steps: Create VAT registration records with TRN, status, type, and VAT period details
Track user-entered VAT returns with output VAT, input VAT, payable VAT, and refund amounts
Record transactions and review estimate-only VAT summaries by period and rate

differences.title: Keep VAT preparation records organized without replacing official filing
differences.description: VAT Assistant UAE is a private record-keeping workspace for planning and review notes, not an official FTA filing product.

items.title: Store business VAT identity
items.description: Capture business name, TRN, registration type, status, country, and VAT period.

items.title: Track filing amounts
items.description: Record output VAT, input VAT, payable VAT, refund amounts, filing status, and submission dates.

items.title: Review VAT activity
items.description: Save invoices, counterparties, transaction type, taxable amount, rate, VAT amount, and notes.

feel.title: A calm preparation workspace for UAE VAT records
feel.description: The app keeps user-entered records structured and labels all summaries as planning information requiring official review.

items.title: Structured
items.description: Registrations, returns, and transactions stay separate but connected.

items.title: Private
items.description: All records are scoped to the authenticated user.

items.title: Bounded
items.description: The app does not provide professional tax advice or official filing.

audiences.title: Who uses VAT Assistant UAE
audiences.description: Useful for UAE businesses that want a structured VAT record before professional review or external filing.

items.title: Small businesses
items.description: Keep VAT registration, return, and transaction notes in one protected workspace.

items.title: Finance teams
items.description: Prepare user-entered VAT schedules before accountant or adviser review.

items.title: Founders
items.description: Track VAT filing status and transaction assumptions without treating them as official filings.

resourceSection.title: VAT workspace essentials
resourceSection.description: V1 focuses on records, estimates, and workflow tracking with clear safety boundaries.

items.title: Registrations
items.description: Business name, TRN, registration type, registration date, VAT period, status, country, and notes.

items.title: Returns
items.description: VAT period, filing due date, output VAT, input VAT, payable VAT, refund amount, status, and submission date.

items.title: Transactions
items.description: Date, invoice number, customer or supplier, transaction type, taxable amount, VAT rate, VAT amount, currency, and notes.

groupedSection.title: From VAT records to review-ready summaries
groupedSection.description: The workflow separates registration identity, return-level filing amounts, and transaction-level VAT activity.

items.name: VAT identity
items.description: Capture TRN, registration type, VAT period, and status.

items.name: Return records
items.description: Track filing status and user-entered VAT amounts.

items.name: VAT by period
items.description: Summaries group output VAT, input VAT, and net payable by VAT period.

items.name: VAT by rate
items.description: Transaction activity groups VAT amounts by user-entered VAT rate.

technicalSection.title: Aligned with Ansiversa workflow standards
technicalSection.description: VAT Assistant UAE uses protected routes, owner-scoped APIs, isolated persistence, shared UI patterns, and explicit filing disclaimers.
items: VAT outputs are labelled planning and record-keeping information.

finalCta.title: Open VAT Assistant UAE
finalCta.description: Start with VAT Registrations, then add returns, transactions, and estimate-only insights.
